scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key components accurately: PathProtocol, ContainerPath, LocalPath, ensure_contents with correct signatures and behavior. Correctly notes absolute-only paths, PebbleConnectionError, idempotent behavior, return value.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states 'charmlibs-pathops>=1' as install instruction (gold standard says 'uv add charmlibs-pathops' without version specifier). Also states glob patterns do not support recursive '**' wildcards — this may be correct but is not verified in gold standard, could be fabricated. The ensure_contents signature shows 'mode: int = 0o644' but gold standard shows default of 420 (which is 0o644 in decimal, so this is actually correct). Overall minor issues only.
